geography.data_source: GHMC ward map 2020, Old City boundary from GHMC heritage zone delineation, Charminar-Falaknuma area

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Hyderabad district tables (Old City wards), GHMC population density maps, distinct demographic profile — majority Muslim population, lower literacy, larger household size

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round (2020-21) Telangana urban tables, PLFS 2022-23 for informal sector, Sachar Committee Report data on Old City Muslim employment patterns, traditional craft industry surveys

commute_profile.data_source: HMR Red Line limited old city coverage, TSRTC bus data, auto-rickshaw as primary mode in narrow old city streets, CMP Hyderabad 2013 mode share data

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Estimated from dense low-income zone patterns, very low institutional trust in Old City communities (Sachar Committee findings), very high political mobilisation due to MIM party organisation, mosque network for diffusion

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from Old City social patterns — mosque-based community networks, craft guild networks, very high clustering within community, very low cross-income bridging

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from Laad Bazaar bangle trade footfall, Charminar tourism and local market surveys, GHMC commercial zone data
Estimated from General Bazaar/Pathergatti wholesale and retail market activity
Estimated from Old City street vendor census data, Falaknuma area vendor concentration
Estimated from Hyderabad pearl trade cluster near Charminar, traditional craft industry surveys

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Dense Low-Income Zone template from AGENT_SPEC.md, directly applicable — Hyderabad Old City is a reference zone for this template

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from GHMC ward councillor count (high density old city wards), very strong mosque leadership network, bangle/pearl trade guild presence, AIMIM political structure
